title: Travelled Paths
description: Naturally generates pathways in commonly travelled routes!
body:
Travelled Paths generates natural paths by giving the game a chance to occasionally convert grass underneath a player into different path blocks when sprinting, while being very lightwieght on the serverside!

Here is the order of conversion:
- Grass turns into Rooted Dirt
- Rooted Dirt turns into Coarse Dirt
- Coarse Dirt turns into Dirt Path

Thank you for downloading!
